task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Postal Codes management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page titled 'Postal Codes' or a list of postal codes is visible in the FreeMED interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the zip code into the form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form field for Zip or Postal Code contains the value '60523'.

task_completion.description: Enter the city and state into the form
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form fields for City and State contain the values 'Oak Brook' and 'IL' respectively.

task_completion.description: Save the new postal code record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the record was saved, or the new record (60523, Oak Brook, IL) is visible in the list of postal codes.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with FreeMED
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the FreeMED interface, not terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeMED application
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL in the browser address bar points to http://localhost/freemed/ or its subpages.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database insertion
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing MySQL commands or script executions to insert the data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected zip code is 60523, the expected city is Oak Brook, and the expected state is IL.
